docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ-HERNANDEZ, NICANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT ZUNIGA, ENRIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
